name: Joe Lycett
bio: Joe Lycett is an English comedian, presenter and artist from Birmingham, known for whimsical, mischievous stand-up and elaborate consumer-rights and prank-based stunts. He began performing in 2009 and was nominated for Best Newcomer at the 2012 Edinburgh Comedy Awards. His television work includes The Great British Sewing Bee and the BAFTA-winning chat show Late Night Lycett.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up; wins Chortle Student Comedian of the Year
Best Newcomer nomination for Some Lycett Hot
DVD Im About to Lose Control released
Begins presenting The Great British Sewing Bee
Wins a BAFTA for Late Night Lycett

accolades: Chortle Student Comedian of the Year (2009)
Edinburgh Comedy Award Best Newcomer nomination (2012)
BAFTA Television Award for Late Night Lycett (2024)

specials.t: Thats the Way A-Ha A-Ha, Joe Lycett
Im About to Lose Control And I Think Joe Lycett
More, More, More! How Do You Lycett?
